text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Nishino Flower! That was awesome!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Everyone! This is my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer's the absolute best and has been running
alongside me this entire time!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Let's hear it for the best trainer ever!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, sorry. But I've always wanted to do this. I
want everyone to know...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That you're the best trainer there is!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Was I able to fully bloom?
choice_data_list:
Of course! You were the most beautiful blossom
out there!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: My own blossoming wasn't up to par!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But congratulations! Your speed was
exemplary—no, it was perfect!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't able to repay you... but I was able to
watch you run.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: The wind I yearned after for so long—now, I can chase it. No, I can surpass it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Do your best, Zephyr!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Best of luck to you too.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: ...Mm. I can smell it upon the breeze... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: The future... is coming.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Nishino Flower! Could you and your
trainer tell us about how you feel about your win
today?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: And this is where I shall excuse myself...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you again, Zephyr!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we finish taking interviews at the winner's
circle...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Great job today, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You looked so cool giving those interviews! Your
posture was super straight and everything!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It made me think all the hard work I put in up till
now was just so I could see you looking as proud
as you did up there.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's not true. It's all because of how hard you
worked!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... How about we say it's thanks to the both
of us, then?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep running together, all the way into the
future!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Hey, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was only able to bloom as beautifully as I did
because of how carefully you guided, trained,
and cared for me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for all of your support... and all the
courage you gave me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad we met! ♪
